# CWE-324 vulnerable: Use of a Key Past its Expiration Date (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-324-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

type SigningKey struct {
	Secret    string
	ExpiresAt time.Time
}

func VerifyPartnerSignature(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, key SigningKey) {
	body := []byte(r.URL.Query().Get("payload"))
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(key.Secret))
	mac.Write(body)
	expected := mac.Sum(nil)
	provided := []byte(r.Header.Get("X-Signature"))
	if len(provided) == len(expected) {
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	}
}
